description: Jurisdiction Onboarding — validates FIPS code, EIN, contact domain, and suite eligibility before provisioning a government tenant

hard_stops.label: Invalid FIPS Code
hard_stops.logic: fips_code not found in Census Bureau FIPS reference dataset — jurisdiction cannot be verified

hard_stops.label: Contact Email Domain Mismatch
hard_stops.logic: primary_contact_email domain does not match the jurisdiction's official domain — potential impersonation

hard_stops.label: Invalid EIN Format
hard_stops.logic: EIN does not conform to IRS XX-XXXXXXX format — cannot verify tax-exempt entity status

hard_stops.label: No Suites Requested
hard_stops.logic: suites_requested array is empty — at least one suite (DMV, Permitting, Inspector, Recorder) must be selected

hard_stops.label: Recorder Suite Without eRecording Compliance
hard_stops.logic: Recorder suite requested but jurisdiction has not confirmed eRecording compliance (PRIA/URPERA standards)

hard_stops.label: Inspector Suite Missing Life-Safety Escalation
hard_stops.logic: Inspector suite requested but life_safety_escalation contact/protocol not provided — cannot deploy inspection workers without escalation path

hard_stops.label: Onboarding Report Not Signed
hard_stops.logic: Onboarding report has not been signed within 14 calendar days of generation — must be re-generated and signed

soft_flags.label: Multiple Suites Requested
soft_flags.logic: Jurisdiction requested 3 or more suites — recommend phased rollout to manage change management risk

soft_flags.label: Small Jurisdiction Population
soft_flags.logic: Jurisdiction population below 10,000 — consider shared-service deployment model
